name: pr_cep_e_exists_infer_reap
comment: D-135: @expires INFERENCE through an exists (absent @expires). exists E1(after[0,50] $a): the exists fires (E0@3,E1@37) at clock 0, then the INFERRED offsets reap E0 at ts+hi+1=54 and E1 at ts+0+1=38, so after advance the WM is empty. Locks the reaping (facts) — inference is invisible to the firing.
drl: rule EX when $a : E0() exists E1(this after[0ms,50ms] $a) then end
